song.title: Today (As For Me And My House)
song.lyrics:
[v1] .A D/F# E A Today I choose to follow You Today I choose to give my 'yes' to You Today I choose to hear Your voice and live Today I choose to follow You [c1] .E B As for me and my house .D A we will serve You .E B as for me and my house .E A E we will spend our lives on You
Today .A D/A A D/A [b] .Bm7 A/C# D2 E Wonderful counseler , Everlasting Father .Bm7 A/C#m Eternal King , Lord of hosts .D2 E willingly we follow [c2] .B E/G F# B Today I choose to follow You Today I choose to give my 'yes' to You Today I choose to hear Your voice and live Today I choose to follow You
